description: Create a new portfolio named 'DCA Strategy' in JStock and record four buy transactions for Meta Platforms (META) to simulate a dollar-cost averaging strategy. Record 10 units for each of the following dates and prices with a broker fee of 4.95 per transaction: Nov 15, 2023 at $332.40; Dec 15, 2023 at $353.96; Jan 15, 2024 at $370.17; and Feb 15, 2024 at $473.28. Save the portfolio and create a summary file at /home/ga/dca_summary.txt listing the total units purchased, total purchase value (before fees), total brokerage fees paid, net total cost (purchase value + fees), and weighted average cost per share.
